title: Oxypetalum karstenianum
taxonomy: Oxypetalum karstenianum belongs to the Apocynaceae family, a group of flowering plants commonly known as dogbane or oleander family. This plant is part of the genus Oxypetalum, a group of plants native to South America. Oxypetalum karstenianum is further classified as a species within the Oxypetalum genus. Its classification is a key aspect of understanding its characteristics and relationships with other plants in the same family. The Apocynaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, with many species found in tropical and subtropical regions.
